# Building Materials Supplier Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-building-materials-building-materials-supplier  
**Vertical slug:** building-materials  
**Niche family:** NF-COM-CON (anchor)  
**Family role:** anchor (variant: iron-steel)  
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria faces a 28 million housing unit deficit — the largest in Africa — driving massive demand for building materials. The sector is dominated by cement (Dangote, BUA, Ibeto, Unicem), iron rods (12mm–25mm), roofing sheets (aluminum/long span), blocks (6-inch/9-inch), tiles, and plumbing materials. Key market hubs: Alaba International Market (Lagos), Trade Fair (Lagos), Nnewi (iron/steel), Onitsha (general building materials), Abuja (Jabi, Nyanya). Cement retails at ₦8,000–₦12,000 per bag; iron rod (12mm, 12m) at ₦18,000–₦25,000 per length; roofing sheets at ₦3,500–₦8,000 per sheet. Bulk pricing (estate developers, contractors) is the primary B2B market.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
**Persona A — Eze Okeke, 44, Onitsha**: Building materials distributor in Onitsha wanting to attract Abuja and Enugu contractors online for bulk cement and iron supply.
**Persona B — Architect Bello Garba, 38, Abuja**: Infrastructure consultant sourcing roofing sheets and blocks for a 50-unit housing estate. Wants supplier with confirmed stock, delivery to site, and corporate invoice.
**Persona C — Mrs Adunola Fashola, 50, Lagos**: Private individual building a bungalow in Ikorodu. First time buying in bulk. Wants to understand cement brand differences and delivery cost.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
**Home:** Hero (supplier name, "Your Trusted Building Materials Partner" tagline, WhatsApp quote CTA), product categories grid (cement, iron rods, blocks, roofing, tiles, sand/granite — with current prices in ₦), trust strip (years in business, brands stocked, delivery coverage, SON/NAFDAC compliance).
**About:** Supplier history, location (Alaba/Onitsha/Abuja), warehouse capacity, delivery fleet.
**Products:** Detailed price list by product, brand, and quantity (bag/ton/unit). Bulk pricing CTA.
**Contact:** WhatsApp quote request, warehouse address, delivery enquiry form with NDPR.

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Professional, reliable, construction-expert. "Strong materials. Strong foundations." Primary CTA: "Get a Bulk Quote via WhatsApp." Trust is built through brand names (Dangote, BUA), pricing transparency, and delivery capability. Nigerian English — construction-industry register.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
Brands stocked (Dangote Cement, BUA, Ibeto, Unicem, Nigerian Eagle); SON compliance mark; years in business; warehouse capacity (tonnage); delivery fleet size; SURCON-registered project references (if applicable); CAC registration; client testimonials (contractors, estate developers); accepted payments: bank transfer, Paystack, cheque (corporate clients); FIRS TIN for corporate invoicing.

## 6. Image Direction
1. Warehouse stacked floor-to-ceiling with Dangote cement bags — scale and reliability.
2. Delivery truck loaded with iron rods arriving at a Lagos construction site — on-time delivery.
3. Construction worker laying blocks with freshly mixed cement — product in use, Nigerian site.
4. Showroom of tiles and roofing sheets — variety and quality on display.
5. Building materials market at Alaba or Onitsha — busy trade, Nigerian commerce energy.
6. Corporate client (architect) reviewing materials sample with supplier rep — B2B relationship.
7. Completed building with high-quality roof and external finish — the end result of quality materials.

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
SON (Standards Organisation of Nigeria): cement and iron rods must carry SON certification — display SON compliance badge. SURCON: structural engineering certification if providing structural advisory. NAFDAC: not applicable for building materials unless tiles/adhesives have specific formulations. CAC: business registration. FIRS TIN: for VAT invoicing on corporate sales. NDPR: contact forms.

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
| Requirement | Status |
|---|---|
| WhatsApp CTA home + contact | ✅ REQUIRED |
| All prices in ₦ | ✅ REQUIRED (per bag, per rod, per sheet) |
| Nigerian brands stocked | ✅ Dangote, BUA, Unicem, Nigerian Eagle |
| SON trust signal | ✅ REQUIRED |
| Nigerian cities | ✅ Alaba, Onitsha, Abuja, Nnewi |
| Bank transfer / Paystack / cheque | ✅ REQUIRED |
| Mobile-first 375px | ✅ REQUIRED |
| NDPR consent | ✅ REQUIRED |
